conflict: The pilot's superior Mars terrain knowledge and preparation versus the crew's dysfunctional coordination
consequence: The pilot demonstrates she is skilled, prepared, and not trying to permanently escape — her evasion has a playful quality; the crew is outmatched in planning if not in raw skill
must_land_beats: Chaotic chase through Hellas basin canyons — the crew's coordination disaster as Spike and Jet argue vectors, Faye breaks formation, Ed gives unparseable navigation
Spike gets close enough to glimpse the pilot in her cockpit — young, dark-haired, focused, almost amused
The pilot drops a chaff cloud and escapes through a maintenance tunnel
The crew discovers they have been chasing a decoy beacon on a freight drone for twenty minutes
Mars traffic violation summons for reckless flying
pressure_source: The pilot's superior Mars terrain knowledge and preparation versus the crew's dysfunctional coordination
state_shift: The pilot demonstrates she is skilled, prepared, and not trying to permanently escape — her evasion has a playful quality; the crew is outmatched in planning if not in raw skill
